## Academic Appointments

```{r}
emp_details <- list(
  # CNIO — Postdoctoral Researcher
  "36898188" = paste(
    "Genetic and Molecular Epidemiology Group.",
    "Causal inference and evidence triangulation applied to",
    "pancreatic and bladder cancer.",
    "Supervisor: Dr. Núria Malats"
  ),
  # ISGlobal — Postdoctoral Researcher (Rakislova Lab)
  "31778472" = paste(
    "Cancer genomics of vulvar and penile squamous cell carcinoma",
    "from whole-exome sequencing: somatic variant calling and",
    "copy-number analysis.",
    "Supervisor: Dr. Natalia Rakislova"
  ),
  # PhD Student — Childhood and Environment
  "15100551" = paste(
    "Early-life exposure to environmental chemicals and child",
    "neurodevelopment (HELIX, ATHLETE cohorts): causal inference,",
    "evidence triangulation, and multi-omic integration.",
    "Supervisor: Prof. Martine Vrijheid"
  )
)

render_affiliations(cv_data$employments, details = emp_details)
```
